title: Gooey Korean Apple Polish Dish
description: This hangover-cure dish features a gooey texture made with apple juice and wrapped in a plant-based-friendly coating, infused with the smoky flavor of smoking.
instructions: Soak apple slices in apple juice for at least 30 minutes.
Mix together smoke-infused breadcrumbs, ground flaxseed, and plant-based milk; set aside.
Combine apple slices with a sprinkle of dijon mustard on one side. Dip the other side into the mixed crumbs mixture.
Place coated apple slices in a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and gooey.
Serve warm as a dessert treat.
